results.rendered_html:
apāśri 1 U.
1 To Resort to, betake oneself to; parasparaṃ kecidapāśrayaṃte  Rām. 
2 To use, practise, employ; āhāramanapāśritya śarīrasyeva dhāraṇaṃ  Mb. 
3 To rest on, lie on (intrans.)
